stem: A loan application enters the loan processing pipeline. The probability of passing application review is 70%. If the previous stage is passed, the probability of passing credit check is between 58% and 76% (uncertain due to evaluator variability). If the previous stage is passed, the probability of passing underwriting is 70%. What is the overall probability that the loan application is approved?

ground_truth.answer: P(approved) ranges from 0.284 to 0.372 as the credit check pass rate varies from 58% to 76%. Point estimate: 0.328.

solution_steps: The loan application must pass all 3 stages sequentially: P(success) = P(stage 1)×P(stage 2)×P(stage 3).
The uncertainty in the credit check stage creates a 8.8 percentage point range in the overall success probability.
common_failure_modes: Adding probabilities instead of multiplying for sequential stages
Using a single value for the credit check rate without acknowledging uncertainty
Not recognizing that uncertainty at one stage propagates through all subsequent stages
